name: Donald J. Trump
subject: This Week on the Campaign Trail
body:
Trump - Make America Great Again!
| |
---
| | [](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zkijidd-drdiuiutjh-r/)
---

| |
---
[www.DonaldJTrump.com](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zkijidd-drdiuiutjh-y/)
| |
---
\- November 22 2015 -
This Week on the Campaign Trail

| Dear Peter Willis, It has been another terrific week on the campaign trail! I want to thank the more than 10,000 SUPPORTERS who came out in Knoxville, Tennessee on Monday, the 12,000 SUPPORTERS who attended our rally in Worcester, Massachusetts on Wednesday, the 10,000 SUPPORTERS who attended our rally in Birmingham, Alabama on Saturday and all of the fantastic people who attended the town halls in Newton, Iowa on Thursday and Spartanburg, South Carolina on Friday. In Knoxville, I spoke about my huge support of the 2nd amendment and the importance of strengthening our military, defeating ISIS and my vision on foreign policy.
_Meeting voters in Knoxville, Tennessee_ In Worcester, the crowd was terrific and even though the subject matter was serious, we managed to have some fun. There was a lot of love and energy in that room! I appreciate it!
_Speaking to over 10,000 voters in Worcester, Massachusetts_ On Wednesday I released a new radio ad in Iowa, New Hampshire and South Carolina stressing the need for real change in Washington, D.C. in order to address problems created by the "all talk, no action politicians" that have failed Americans for far too long. If you have not heard them on the radio, you can listen [here](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zkijidd-drdiuiutjh-j/). On Thursday we traveled to Newton, Iowa to talk about something I know a lot about... job creation! Years ago I was inspired to help some folks in this area and wanted to return to share my vision of what we can do to turn the country around.
_Our town hall in Newton, Iowa_ On Friday I visited Spartanburg, South Carolina for a town hall at Wofford College. I really enjoyed speaking with voters from across the state on a wide range of issues that have been cornerstones of my campaign including illegal immigration, taking care of our vets, rebuilding the infrastructure of our country and creating jobs for hard working Americans. _Discussing a range of issues in Spartanburg, South Carolina_ I was honored to be interviewed by the legendary Barbara Walters for a special episode of 20/20 on ABC. I am so proud of my beautiful family – they have been so supportive and know how hard I will work to make the American Dream bigger and better and stronger than ever before. If you missed the show, you can watch ["Meet the Trumps" here.](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zkijidd-drdiuiutjh-t/)_My family and I had the great honor of being interviewed by Barbara Walters_ Saturday, I returned to Alabama for the first time since hosting more than 30,000 supporters in Mobile this summer. The Secretary of State said our Mobile event remains the largest attended political rally for any presidential candidate of either party! It was great to be back in Alabama! I am so grateful for the enthusiasm from all across that great state and all across the country.
_Speaking to crowd in Birmingham, Alabama_ Which brings me to the polls...There were so many fantastic polls this week both nationally and in the states. We are winning every single one and some of them show me with a wide, double-digit lead over my closest rivals. This would not be possible without your support. I share your concerns on the issues that matter and I will put America first, in order to keep your family and our country safe. Next week we will visit [Columbus, Ohio](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zkijidd-drdiuiutjh-i/) and [Myrtle Beach, South Carolina](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zkijidd-drdiuiutjh-d/) before the Thanksgiving Holiday. It is such an important time to reflect on the blessings in our lives. Even though our country is in serious trouble, we have a lot to be thankful for. I am most thankful for my wonderful family and all of you. With your continued support we will Make America Great Again. God Bless You and Yours, Donald J. Trump
---

Donald J. Trump

[Forward to a friend](http://donaldtrumpcampaign.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-drdiuiutjh-E524705E-zkijidd-l-b)

| Paid for by Donald J. Trump for President, Inc.
[info@donaldtrump.com](mailto:info@donaldtrump.com)
---

name: Rand Paul
subject: Here's how you end the ISIS circle of death
disclaimer_text:
paid
for by American taxpayers are in ISIS's hands
body:
In the wake of the devastating terrorist attacks in Paris and
Beirut, our thoughts and prayers are with the victims and those
who lost loved ones. Working together with our allies and
friends, we have to step up our fight against terrorism.
If our existing strategy of drone strikes,
proxy wars, and toppled governments isn't the answer, what is?
As a doctor, I know that attacking symptoms
isn't the same thing as finding a cure. I'm also mindful of what
the Cold War official and nuclear strategist Paul Nitze said:
"One of the most dangerous forms of human error is forgetting
what one is trying to achieve." If we are to eradicate ISIS once
and for all, it's time to take a hard look at what is fueling its
growth: money.
ISIS's reserve of an estimated $2 billion
makes it the world's most well-financed terrorist organization.
Airstrikes have impacted ISIS's oil trade, but there's one form
of funding we can put an immediate stop to: donations from
citizens, purported nonprofit groups, and governments or private
sources in Gulf nations including Saudi Arabia, Qatar and Kuwait.
Hundreds of millions of dollars worth of military equipment paid
for by American taxpayers are in ISIS's hands.

This unholy circle of
death needs to be shut down once and for all!

We must make sure our defense spending
matches our priorities. We do not become stronger by adding more
debt to finance military actions that lack a strategy.
I'm fed up with my opponents like Marco Rubio
and Hillary Clinton who would rather send our sons and daughters
to war than turn off the spigot of blood money flowing from these
so-called allies. It's morally outrageous and puts this country
at serious risk. I will continue to stand strong against reckless
policies that make this country less safe.
Our focus should be at home. We can start
with immgration policies. For years, I have called for
limitations on admitting foreigners who want to come from
countries consumed with hate for America, and I have called for
reinstating a program of special scrutiny for anyone coming here
from countries that have hotbeds of radical jihadism.
In fact, Marco Rubio blocked my "Trust but
Verify" amendment that would have allowed this country to develop
an effective screening process that would've made America safer.
We should be prioritizing securing our borders and bolstering our
law enforcement. The tragedy in Paris is unfortunately why we
need to be extraordinarily cautious in who we allow to immigrate,
visit or study in this country.
These kind of outrageous decisions to block
conservative amendments put our country at risk, and how will we
fight back under a President Clinton or President Rubio? War?
We already know the risks of sending our sons
and daughters to fight in Iraq and Syria. We've seen how easily
short-term victories on the ground can give way to unintended
catastrophes over the long term. It's time for a smarter
strategy-one that requires a bold display of courage not from our
soldiers, but from our political leaders.
I will keep fighting for smart policies that
keep this country safe.

Will you stand with me today?
In liberty,
Rand Paul

Pitch in $25 TODAY >>

Pitch in $50 TODAY >>

Pitch in $75 TODAY >>

Pitch in $100 TODAY>>

Or donate another
amount >>

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: John Weaver, Chief Strategist
subject: Standing up to Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[](www.JohnKasich.com)

Peter, Donald Trump is in Ohio today and we're expecting him to attack John Kasich like he did last week because it's the only thing he knows how to do when anybody questions his bombastic rhetoric.

**[Chip in $25 or more now to support John Kasich](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31824360:WE9USCyaN:m:1:958431888:28BB366C29E4FCEF7FBF9A425053A136:r)**.

**How do you think Mr. Trump will handle Russia's Putin or ISIS?****** Fire off a barrage of tweets? Trump actually thinks we should let Russia take care of ISIS. He must not realize that ISIS is a threat to all of us.

**America needs a President who has the national security experience to defeat ISIS and can build a team of nations to carry out the mission**. **John Kasich is ready to lead. He put forward a plan months ago to wipe out ISIS.**

[Will you chip in $10, $25, $55 or more right now to re-affirm your support for John Kasich](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31824360:WE9USCyaN:m:1:958431888:28BB366C29E4FCEF7FBF9A425053A136:r) and to help us continue educating Americans about why Donald Trump is unfit to be President?

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31824360:WE9USCyaN:m:1:958431888:28BB366C29E4FCEF7FBF9A425053A136:r)

No Republican has EVER won the White House without winning Ohio. **John Kasich WILL defeat Hillary if he is our nominee**. A Donald Trump primary victory would not only result in a loss in Ohio, but a landslide victory for Hillary.

**[Peter, we can't let that happen](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31824360:WE9USCyaN:m:1:958431888:28BB366C29E4FCEF7FBF9A425053A136:r)**.

Thank you!

**John Weaver**
Chief Strategist
[JohnKasich.com](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31824360:WE9USCyaN:m:1:958431888:28BB366C29E4FCEF7FBF9A425053A136:r)

P.S. In case you missed our web videos about Mr. Trump, watch them below:

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31824361:WE9USCyaN:m:1:958431888:28BB366C29E4FCEF7FBF9A425053A136:r)
[

name: Team Jeb
subject: Add your voice
body:
Friend -- we're going through the results for our American Priorities Survey, and we're still short of our goal of 25,000 participants.

**We noticed your name is still missing. Can you fill this out quick? It will only take a minute:[Jeb2016.com/2016-American-Priorities-Survey/](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/ntdhgtkmjpdnwbwqntzhjncbkkncmbgmhtrtdmbykrkk_idnmmzcg.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)**

** dpwillis67@gmail.com**
** 2016 American Priorities Survey Response: PENDING**

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/bclkvjzmbqgydndpyjtkbysnzzysmnvmkjcjgmnlzbdd_idnmmzcg.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

**We need to compile the final results before the end of the month, and it 's critical we hit our goal of 25,000 grassroots participants.**

It'll only take a minute, but we need you to fill it out before time runs out: [**Jeb2016.com/2016-American-Priorities-Survey/**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/ezrljtqwphbfdcdrftklpfvcqqfvwcjwltztbwcsqpdr_idnmmzcg.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

So, please take one minute right now to add your voice to the debate.

\-- Team Jeb

**-- Begin Forwarded Message--
From: Jeb Bush
Date: November 20, 2015
Subject: Short survey for you, Friend**
Friend -

Our economy isn't growing, radical Islamic terrorism is creating new threats at home, and American leadership is nowhere to be found.

Needless to say, there's a lot at stake in 2016.

As I look to tackle these problems, I need your advice and input on what issues matter most to you. With less than 75 days until the Iowa Caucuses, now's the time to get off the sideline and make your voice heard.

[**Friend , I need you to take a few minutes right now and complete our 2016 American Priorities Survey.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/rtjfyklbwvgpjsjcpkqfwphsllphbsybfktkgbsrlwjr_idnmmzcg.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)
[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/ygvryfvtcgknmwmsnfzrcnpwvvnptwytrfbfktwlvcmq_idnmmzcg.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

This election is about the American people. It's not about the pundits or the press. It's about you.

**That 's why we need 25,000 people to fill out this survey before the end of the month.** Your responses will be directly incorporated into this campaign and help shape our strategy moving forward.

**Friend , your thoughts, your opinions and your feedback matter to me. Please fill out our 2016 American Priorities Survey now: [Jeb2016.com/2016-American-Priorities-Survey/](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/ksfkwrpqfsvjtztljrgkfjbzppjbqzwqkrdrvqzhpftr_idnmmzcg.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)**

Thank you,

Jeb

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/plctwyvkdlmbfgfhbystdbrgvvbrkgwktycymkgqvdfm_idnmmzcg.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)
Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144
[Unsubscribe](http://www.email.jeb2016.com/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=5845&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=18)

name: George Pataki
subject: Doubling Down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pataki for President, Inc
body:
-
http://cts.vresp.com/c/?WWLLC/f6612e4d00/ace65cf3c9/38aef52e42/sc=1123eb

Friend,

Our campaign has reached a turning point.

Last Thursday, we filed our paperwork to appear on -
http://cts.vresp.com/c/?WWLLC/f6612e4d00/ace65cf3c9/873672ccb0
New Hampshire's First-In-The-Nation primary ballot. On Friday, we
learned that Governor Pataki has already qualified for -
http://cts.vresp.com/c/?WWLLC/f6612e4d00/ace65cf3c9/a38ebc7952
CNN's next debate on December 15th.

We also learned that -
http://cts.vresp.com/c/?WWLLC/f6612e4d00/ace65cf3c9/46055ceecb
NBC is granting our request for equal time to match Donald Trump's
12-minute appearance on Saturday Night Live. As a result, we will
have the equivalent of 12 minutes of free airtime on NBC affiliates
covering Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina. This amounts to
literally hundreds of thousands of dollars in free advertising on NBC
affiliates!

This is game-changing news, and it doubles our resolve to win this
election. Let me be clear: I am in this race, I am staying in, and I
am in it to win it!

The recent attacks in Paris underscore the need for a serious
candidate who's ready to be Commander in Chief on Day One. As the
Governor of New York on September 11th, I saw firsthand the danger
that Islamic terrorism poses to the American people. As President, I
will destroy ISIS and its allies overseas before their terror reaches
America's shores.

The New Hampshire primary is a little more than two months away. I
ask you to stand with me as we make our final push. Please join our
campaign with a $2, $5, $25, $50, $100, $500, $1,000, or even $2,700
contribution today. -
http://cts.vresp.com/c/?WWLLC/f6612e4d00/ace65cf3c9/cf1c904a4b/sc=1123eb Every contribution--no matter how small--makes a big difference.

Thank you for all that you do, and have a wonderful Thanksgiving
week.

George Pataki

Paid for by Pataki for President, Inc.

www.GeorgePataki.com -
http://cts.vresp.com/c/?WWLLC/f6612e4d00/ace65cf3c9/44170c54c7

______________________________________________________________________
Click to view this email in a browser
http://hosted.verticalresponse.com/1453469/f6612e4d00/545562933/ace65cf3c9/

If you no longer wish to receive these emails, please reply to this
message with "Unsubscribe" in the subject line or simply click on the
following link:

http://cts.vresp.com/u?f6612e4d00/ace65cf3c9/mlpftw

______________________________________________________________________
This message was sent by George Pataki

Pataki for President
132 East 43rd Street #614
New York, New York 10017
US

We also learned that - NBC is granting our request for equal time to match Donald Trump's 12-minute appearance on Saturday Night Live. As a result, we will have the equivalent of 12 minutes of free airtime on NBC affiliates covering Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina. This amounts to literally hundreds of thousands of dollars in free advertising on NBC affiliates! This is game-changing news, and it doubles our resolve to win this election. Let me be clear: I am in this race, I am staying in, and I am in it to win it! The recent attacks in Paris underscore the need for a serious candidate who's ready to be Commander in Chief on Day One. As the Governor of New York on September 11th, I saw firsthand the danger that Islamic terrorism poses to the American people. As President, I will destroy ISIS and its allies overseas before their terror reaches America's shores. The New Hampshire primary is a little more than two months away. I ask you to stand with me as we make our final push. Please join our campaign with a $2, $5, $25, $50, $100, $500, $1,000, or even $2,700 contribution today. - Every contribution--no matter how small--makes a big difference. Thank you for all that you do, and have a wonderful Thanksgiving week. George Pataki Paid for by Pataki for President, Inc. www.GeorgePataki.com - Click to view this email in a browser

name: Rand Paul
subject: DC Police Chief says the unthinkable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Fellow Conservative -

Washington, D.C.'s police chief disagrees
with those who believes that the only way we can combat terrorist
attacks is by giving up more of our liberties. In fact, she went
on CBS's 60 Minutes and said:

"If you're in a position to try and take the
gunman down, to take the gunman out, it's the best option for
saving lives before police can get there."

Citizens using firearms to protect themselves
against criminals and terrorists Recognizing the Second Amendment
in Washington, D.C. of all places?

To many in our media and Big Government
politicians in BOTH parties, the very concept is absurd.
But in expanding liberty - instead of
attacking it - it's exactly the solution our country needs.

As I told you recently, I introduced the
Defend Our Capital Act to restore law-abiding Americans right to
carry concealed weapons in Washington, D.C.
This bill would remove existing restrictive
firearm ownership laws in the District of Columbia, and require
the District of Columbia to issue and grant reciprocity for
concealed weapons permits for both residents and non-residents.
This legislation will immediately improve the
security of our country and the safety of those visiting the
Capitol by:

Requiring the District of Columbia to
begin issuing concealed weapons permits for both residents and
non-residents.
Allowing for national reciprocity of
conceal and carry weapons permits between states and for carry by
active duty military.
Allowing for the carrying of firearms on
public, non-sensitive areas of federal property.
Allowing for the purchase of firearms
across state lines.

More government is NOT the solution to our
problems.
In far too many cases, it's actually the root
cause!
Studies prove gun grabs don't work. Instead,
more guns in the hands of law-abiding citizens results in less
violence.
America has been the greatest and freest
country in human history because of the roadmap our Founders
handed us in the U.S. Constitution, which recognizes the
God-given right of free people to keep and bear arms.
Today, there isn't one of our constitutional
liberties that isn't under assault by members of BOTH parties.
Frankly, I worry about where this nation is
headed if we don't stand up fight back.
I'm committed to defending our Constitution.
All of it.
Will you please stand with me by making your
most generous contribution of $50, $25 or even $10 right away?
In liberty,
Rand Paul

Give $10 Today >>

Give $25 Today >>

Give $50 Today >>

Give $100 Today >>

Or donate another
amount >>

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/isabuTYyZN

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Chris Christie
subject: What are you thankful for?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc
body:
Peter,
This Thanksgiving I am thankful for my family, our country, and I am abundantly thankful for the opportunity I have right now -- the opportunity to run to be the next President of our United States. Thank you to those who come out to my town halls and events, those that ask me the hard questions that not only are facing this country, but affect them personally.

I want you to know, I hear you. This is our campaign and I am running with you and for you.

**[Will you join me in sharing what you're most thankful for this Thanksgiving season?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45047633:J9MFVPLN5:m:1:1516426255:AE305C861228D243C68147BA1DEE0017:r)** We're going to be selecting some of your thoughts and posting them on social media so that we can share them with our followers.

I know this is a short week and you have a lot to do to get ready for Thanksgiving, **[but I would really appreciate hearing back from you](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45047633:J9MFVPLN5:m:1:1516426255:AE305C861228D243C68147BA1DEE0017:r)**.
\-- Chris
****

****
****
****

---
| |
---|---|---
| | Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc.
---

Contributions to Chris Christie for President, Inc. are not tax deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.

You can view this email in your web browser [**here**](https://echo7.bluehornet.com/p/vJ9MFVPLN5).

P.O. Box 9119
Morristown, NJ 07963
(973) 936-9318
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com
**You can unsubscribe instantly[here](http://echo7.bluehornet.com/p/oJ9MFVPLN5)**.
| |

name: BREAKING-NEWS (via vanhollen.org)
subject: New Poll (you will want to see!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| **BREAKING NEWS** : CHRIS VAN HOLLEN LEADS IN SENATE RACE BY DOUBLE DIGITS AGAINST PRIMARY OPPONENT. [**CONTRIBUTE NOW**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c4e/70cdc2ba/47b014fa/3967d10/4247066148/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-poll?refcode=em112215_poll&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+CONTRIBUTE+NOW+&utm_campaign=em112215_poll&source=em112215_poll")
Dear Friend,

We've got great news that you helped make possible--a new Baltimore Sun poll shows that Chris is LEADING the only other declared candidate in the race by 14 POINTS.

The first 48 hours after a poll like this is released are the most critical to show momentum. That's why we have set a goal to have our biggest grassroots month ever. Are you in?

[**Please contribute to Chris's Senate campaign today to show the true strength of our people-powered movement.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c4e/70cdc2ba/47b014fa/3967d11/4247066148/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-poll?refcode=em112215_poll&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Please+contribute+to+Chriss+Senate+campa&utm_campaign=em112215_poll&source=em112215_poll")

With your help, voters are getting to know about Chris's record of effective leadership. And they are getting to know that Chris is THE candidate in this race to effectively stand up to big corporate special interests...every single day.

YOUR support is what has helped get our message out. But many Maryland voters still don't know about Chris' record. That's why we need your help now. We must seize the moment.

[**Help us have our biggest grassroots month yet. The first 48 hours after a poll are the most critical--so there has never been a more critical time to give.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c4e/70cdc2ba/47b014fa/3967d2e/4247066148/VEsF/ **[Donate $100 right now>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c4e/70cdc2ba/47b014fa/3967d2a/4247066148/VEsB/ The Baltimore Sun reported that Chris is leading "in virtually every corner of the state," but we can't take anything for granted. That's why we have to make sure we keep our momentum going.

[**Rush your most urgent contribution--we 've only got a few hours to make a strong stand! **](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c4e/70cdc2ba/47b014fa/3967d28/4247066148/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-poll?refcode=em112215_poll&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=9+-+Rush+your+most+urgent+contributionwersqu&utm_campaign=em112215_poll&source=em112215_poll")

Team Van Hollen

name: Katie McGinty
subject: Five years and nothing to show for it
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---
Friend --

We have a critical deadline coming up next week and we've set our most aggressive fundraising goal to date -- 5,000 founding donors before the end of the month. **This will be the biggest test yet of the strength of this grassroots campaign, and we can 't fall short.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $5 to help us reach our 5,000 founding donor goal?](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8999392619104567296/-3413989101802618880?refcode=e20151123&refcode2=e20151123nd&amount=5)**

Thousands of folks from across all of Pennsylvania and the United States have already stepped up to support our campaign because they know the stakes are too high to sit out.

After five years in the Senate, Pat Toomey has nothing to show for it except reckless votes and dangerous policies that do nothing but hurt hardworking Pennsylvanians. Pat Toomey has voted for cuts to women's health, killed Pennsylvania jobs by supporting bad trade deals, and worked tirelessly to chip away at environmental protections. And that's just the tip of the iceberg!

**There 's no question about it: Pennsylvania cannot afford six more years of Pat Toomey. But defeating him and his special interest backers is going to take a strong grassroots campaign, and that's exactly why I'm reaching out to you today.**

**[Friend, I'm asking for your help: Will you chip in $5 or whatever you can right now and help us reach our biggest goal yet? In a race this close and this critical, every dollar makes a world of difference.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8999392619104567296/-3413989101802618880?refcode=e20151123&refcode2=e20151123nd&amount=5)**

Thanks,

Katie

| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8999392619104567296/-3413989101802618880?refcode=e20151123&refcode2=e20151123nd&amount=5)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8999392619104567296/-3486046695840546816).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Michelle Kwan, HillaryClinton.com
subject: Add your name for a free trip to DC
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Meet some of the ladies of the Senate and Hillary! | Friend --

>From the Olympics to the State Department to Hillary's campaign for president, I still stop sometimes and look around at the inspiring, strong women I get to work with every day.

It's probably no surprise that I admire the powerhouse of Democratic women who work in the Senate right now, and when I heard that a bunch of them were getting together to have dinner with Hillary, I thought that was just too cool!

You can be there to talk with Senators Gillibrand and Mikulski, or maybe Feinstein, and of course, Hillary.

**Just add your name to be entered for a chance to have dinner with these fearless ladies who legislate:**
[ | | [**Add my name**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjQwNjU0NzIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgyMzUxNDMzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjQwNjU0NzIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgyMzUxNDMzS0&mt=1&rt=0) Good luck!

Michelle

Michelle Kwan
Surrogate Outreach Coordinator
Hillary for America

**No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to win, and will not improve chances of winning.** Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 11/2/15 and 11/24/15. Enter by contributing [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjQwNjU0NzIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgyMzUxNDMzS0&mt=1&rt=0) or click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=33&ms=MjQwNjU0NzIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgyMzUxNDMzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to enter without donating. One winner and a guest will receive special invitations to attend official campaign event in Washington, D.C. with Hillary and Democratic women senators, round-trip airline tickets from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to Washington, D.C., and (1) night hotel accommodation (approximate retail value of Prizes: $1650). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to [Official Rules](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=27&ms=MjQwNjU0NzIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgyMzUxNDMzS0&mt=1&rt=0) and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary for America, 300 Cadman Plaza W, Brooklyn, NY 11201. | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=31&ms=MjQwNjU0NzIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgyMzUxNDMzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjQwNjU0NzIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgyMzUxNDMzS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjQwNjU0NzIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgyMzUxNDMzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjQwNjU0NzIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgyMzUxNDMzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjQwNjU0NzIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgyMzUxNDMzS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
